verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Too long we've lived our lives In a cushion of worldly comfort Trying to save ourselves From the coming sudden destruction But, Lord, we want to touch that septre With you we want to find favour Only through self-sacrifice Can we enter in your presence

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Separate me, Lord From this world of sin For rapturing condition Lord, please cleanse me from within I don't want self preservation But total separation You anoint me, Lord, You separate

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We want to see full power restored To the church again And in our lives we will see The third pull manifest Then we will see our sick healed A church fulfilling prophecy Lord, we want to rise And live in our inheritance.
